subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! This is one of the days of Thy Riḍván Festival whereon Thou didst shed the splendour of Thy name
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا یوم من ایام الرضوان الذی فیه تجلیت علی من علی الارض
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
